feedback.text: Great initiative, digital world has been lacking regulations for over a decade leading to sketchy and abusive malpractices. It would be nice for the initiative to also cover the lack of regulations about live service games, in particular the part where companies are allowed to suddenly kill all online services, without any End of Life plan which causes all purchased copies of that game to be unplayable. The same issue has been raised in the Stop Killing Games initiative, but given that this is also an act for digital products and partially for video games, it would be a good place to address these issues.
